name: Beet Green Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 1-quart souffle dish; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
2. Slice the cooked beets and line the bottom of the souffle dish with them.
3. In a small saucepan, melt the butter, stir in the flour, add the hot broth, and continue to cook until slightly thickened. Transfer to a larger bowl.
4. Coarsely chop the beet greens and add to the sauce along with the cheddar cheese.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the egg yolks; blend them with the beet green mixture.
6. Beat the egg whites until they form peaks.
7. Fold the beaten egg whites into the bowl with the other ingredients; blend well.
8. Transfer all to the buttered souffle dish. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until the souffle is puffed and golden.
